title: Sexual Problems in Men | Erectile Dysfunction | MedlinePlus
content: Sexual Problems in Men On this page Basics Summary Diagnosis and Tests Treatments and Therapies Learn More Related Issues Specifics See, Play and Learn No links available Research Clinical Trials Journal Articles Resources No links available For You Older Adults Patient Handouts Summary Many men have sexual problems. They become more common as men age. Problems can include: Erectile dysfunction Reduced or lost interest in sex Problems with ejaculation Low testosterone Stress, illness, medicines, or emotional problems may also be factors. Occasional problems with sexual function are common. If problems last more than a few months or cause distress for you or your partner, you should see your health care provider.
